text:
キリトくんは、武器強化のことを
いろいろ調べたいみたい。
時間がかかりそうだから
マトイがおすすめの絶景を
一緒に観にいこうと思うんだけど
あなたも一緒に三人でどう？

※アスナ、マトイのみ同行
ノーマル以上でクリア

Looks like Kirito's looking into weapon
enhancement. He gets wrapped up in these
things, so it's going to take some time.
In the meanwhile, Matoi
was going to show me some picturesque views.
How about you join us?

Note: Clear on Normal or above with
Asuna and Matoi as your only partners.
